cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out between what times Andrew could have gone to the clothing store. First, I need to look at all the times when Andrew was seen doing other activities and see when he was free. The clothing store was closed after 9pm, so the latest he could have gone is before 9pm. Andrew woke up at 5am. Then, William saw him playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6am, he was at the tennis court. Then Jessica saw him buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 9am.
